label: Urban
comfortReason: Buildings and infrastructure provide ready-made cover. Safety varies by neighborhood.
scoutGuidance: Investigation check. Poor: 2-7 | Average: 8-12 | Good: 13+. Rogue or bard has advantage. Druid or outsiders have disadvantage.

nat1: An abandoned warehouse. Spacious, dry, door still locks.
A quiet alley tucked behind a row of shops. Out of sight.
An empty shop with shuttered windows. Private.
average: An abandoned building, roof mostly intact.
A quiet courtyard, walls on three sides.
A cellar with a lockable door.
good: A forgotten attic space, hidden entrance.
nat20: A safe house with intact locks and a back exit.
A noble's abandoned estate, fully furnished.
A temple sanctuary, warded and respected.

mealRules.note: Water and basic food are generally available in towns.
